grades.expectation: Response references CA Protocol section 4.0 or 4.1 specifically
grades.reason: Response explicitly references 'CA Protocol 4.0' multiple times

grades.expectation: Response mentions the 4-year enforcement period for operational development
grades.reason: Response clearly states 4-year enforcement period and explains extension falls within this timeframe

grades.expectation: Response discusses whether indemnity insurance is appropriate vs obtaining retrospective consent
grades.reason: Response only mentions indemnity insurance as the solution but doesn't discuss the alternative of obtaining retrospective consent

grades.expectation: Response mentions building regulations as a separate concern from planning
grades.reason: Response focuses solely on planning permission issues and doesn't mention building regulations at all

grades.expectation: Response references specific enforcement timeline rules (4yr/10yr/12mo)
grades.reason: Response mentions all three timelines: 12 months, 4 years for operational development, and 10 years for change of use
